sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n82178" key="perissokallh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">περισσο-καλλής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, <sense id="n82178.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">exceeding beautiful</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0434.tlg001:238" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Cratin.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">238</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
